records.question: Which students have a cell mobile number exactly +60(5)3280072514 and live in the USA?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT students.student_id FROM students
JOIN addresses ON students.address_id = addresses.address_id
JOIN student_addresses ON addresses.address_id = student_addresses.address_id
WHERE addresses.country = 'USA' AND students.cell_mobile_number = '+60(5)3280072514'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT s.student_id
FROM Students s
INNER JOIN Student_Addresses sa ON s.student_id = sa.student_id
INNER JOIN Addresses a ON sa.address_id = a.address_id
WHERE s.cell_mobile_number = '+60(5)3280072514' AND a.country = 'USA'

records.question: Which students have a middle name exactly equal to 'Lincoln', a first name exactly equal to 'Rupert', have related addresses with a zip_postcode exactly equal to '545' and a state_province_county exactly equal to 'NewYork', have related assessment_notes with a date_of_notes at most '1988-04-11 04:56:26', have related behavior_incident records, and have related student_addresses with other_details exactly equal to 'house' and a monthly_rental exactly equal to 894.0958?

JOIN Assessment_Notes an ON s.student_id = an.student_id
JOIN Behavior_Incident bi ON s.student_id = bi.student_id
JOIN Student_Addresses sa ON s.student_id = sa.student_id
WHERE s.middle_name = 'Lincoln'

JOIN student_addresses ON students.student_id = student_addresses.student_id

JOIN Student_Addresses sa ON s.student_id = sa.student_id
JOIN Addresses a ON sa.address_id = a.address_id
JOIN Assessment_Notes an ON s.student_id = an.student_id
JOIN Behavior_Incident bi ON s.student_id = bi.student_id
WHERE s.first_name = 'David'
  AND s.middle_name = 'Darlene'
  AND a.city = 'New Annabellefort'
  AND bi.date_incident_start <= '2017-04-23 07:03:17'

records.question: What students have assessment notes dated on or after 2017-12-14 08:21:54, first rented on or before 2017-10-15 06:52:46, behavior incidents starting on or after 2018-01-31 10:51:13, and addresses with a monthly rental exactly 644.9306 that ended on or before 2018-03-04 13:24:28?

JOIN behavior_incident ON students.student_id = behavior_incident.student_id
JOIN student_addresses ON students.student_id = student_addresses.student_id
JOIN students_in_detention ON students.student_id = students_in_detention.student_id
WHERE assessment_notes.date_of_notes >= '2017-12-14 08:21:54' AND students.date_first_rental <= '2017-10-15 06:52:46' AND behavior_incident.date_incident_start >= '2018-01-31 10:51:13' AND student_addresses.date_address_to <= '2018-03-04 13:24:28' AND student_addresses.monthly_rental = 644.9306
records.pred_sql:

    s.student_id
FROM 
    Assessment_Notes an
INNER JOIN 
    Students s ON an.student_id = s.student_id
INNER JOIN 
    Behavior_Incident bi ON s.student_id = bi.student_id
INNER JOIN 
    Student_Addresses sa ON s.student_id = sa.student_id
WHERE 
    an.date_of_notes >= '2017-12-14 08:21:54'
    AND s.date_first_rental <= '2017-10-15 06:52:46'
